## Quality evidence

- [ ] Acceptance examples reviewed with the team
- [ ] Appropriate lower-level checks added or updated
- [ ] Critical UI wiring covered where valuable
- [ ] Exploratory/accessibility work completed according to risk
- [ ] Monitoring, rollback or safe-disable impact considered
